content.text:
*long pause*

I don't. That's why there's wine.

*short laugh, no real humor in it*

I tried once, maybe three weeks after she died. Just sat with it. And it wasn't — it wasn't like crying or whatever I expected. It was more like this... panic. Like the floor wasn't there. I didn't know what I was even feeling, just that it was too big and I was alone in my apartment and there was nobody to call at 11pm who actually wanted to hear it.

So I stopped trying that. The wine is more predictable.

*quieter*

My friends checked in for maybe the first month. Now they've moved on. Which is fine. I get it. Life keeps going.
